recorded_by: the assistant operating under the owner's standing delegation
relationship_to_authority: This record is NOT an approval basis and must never be bound as one. Authority for relaunches flows exclusively from the owner-authored standing delegation at rejudge/phase2_standing_delegation_2026-07-19.json. This record only NARROWS how the assistant will exercise that delegation, adopting the oracle's consult #22 constraint list verbatim. Narrowing constraints bind the assistant; they cannot expand any authority.
constraints_adopted: one aggregate $15 cap across every attempt; fresh per-attempt ledgers never reset it
models, prompts, questions, seeds, sides, temperatures, token limits, parsing, scoring, and selection unchanged
transport-only diffs verified mechanically by the allowed-diff validators
SDK-internal retries fixed at zero; ledger attempts never increased above three
streaming may only expand, with all reasoning models required to stream
fresh execution identity and fresh ledger per attempt; immutable closures for every prior attempt
sequential execution; one exclusive live-run owner
successful cells always carried forward, never replayed
no-output ambiguous cells replaceable only after an immutable closure with worst-case accounting
automatic authority expires on scientific drift, price or model drift, cap exhaustion, stage completion, canary or main transition, five relaunches, or 2026-08-31, whichever comes first
note: A prior subagent correctly declined to seal scope-modifying text as part of the authority chain. This record resolves that concern by construction: it lives outside the chain, restricts only the assistant's own conduct, and any manifest binding it as an approval basis must fail validation.
